parameters.name: dstName
parameters.description: The name of the destination MaxCompute table.

parameters.name: dstProjectName
parameters.description: The name of the destination MaxCompute project.

parameters.name: dstSchemaName
parameters.description: The name of the destination MaxCompute schema. This parameter is null if the destination MaxCompute project does not have a schema layer.

parameters.name: lastDdlTimeEnd
parameters.description: The end of the time range for lastDdlTime.

parameters.name: lastDdlTimeStart
parameters.description: The start of the time range for lastDdlTime.

parameters.name: onlyName
parameters.description: Specifies whether to return only the names of the tables.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of entries to return on each page.

parameters.name: sorter.numRows
parameters.description: The sort order for the number of rows.

parameters.name: sorter.size
parameters.description: The sort order for the data size.

parameters.name: sourceId
parameters.description: The ID of the data source.
